title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.720 - Milk — regulation — inspection
text:
71.720.  Milk — regulation — inspection. — All cities and towns in the state shall have power, by ordinance, to license and regulate milk dairies and the sale of milk, and provide for the inspection thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 7355) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7204; 1919 § 8646; 1909 § 9534
